title: Crowd Ascent
tagline: Rally an army. Climb the Spiral Bastion. Bury the Titan.
description: A 3D crowd-runner. Grow a single recruit into a roaring horde by funneling through +N and ×N gates, dodge fire and red trap-gates, then hurl your whole army at a kaiju boss at the summit. Army size vs. boss health decides it.
author: bankh
